raw_consumer_statement:
Between XX/XX/XXXX, and XX/XX/XXXX, XXXX unauthorized charges totaling {$18000.00} appeared on my account from " XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX. '' I have XXXX affiliation with this merchant. 
I timely disputed these charges on XX/XX/XXXX. After a two-month review, Citibank denied the claim on XX/XX/XXXX, without providing evidence of how they determined the charges were valid. Since the denial, I have called the dispute department bi-weekly. While representatives have been professional, no progress has been made, and the fraudulent balance remains on my account, accruing interest and threatening my credit standing.

Citibank has failed to properly investigate a clear case of identity/account fraud and has not fulfilled its obligations under the Fair Credit Billing Act to correct a blatant billing error. I am seeking a full reversal of the {$18000.00} in charges and all associated interest.
